extra.reason:
Live-verified end-to-end and merged to main on all three repos.

Live results (2026-05-24):
- CPU pod cost: $0.06/hr (verified via GraphQL deployCpuPod path)
- Full SSE event sequence captured: pod_spawned -> preflight_start ->
  preflight_ok -> 4x (download_start + download_done) -> install_done.ok=true
- Total elapsed (all 4 files cached): 208s on the install-preset CLI flow
- /shutdown self-terminate verified: pod 404 within ~10s
- Concurrent /install correctly returns 409
- Total verification cost: well under $0.10

Merged to main:
- Hearmeman24/ComfyGen @ 2f08022
- Hearmeman24/remote-comfy-gen-handler @ 9d88592
- Hearmeman24/remote-comfy-gen-docker @ 9b6f852 (image installer-v5 already
  built by CircleCI from the feature-branch tag push)

Final test count on ComfyGen main: 99/99 pass.

Follow-up consumer work tracked at [[sgs-ui-8ww]] (replaces the old
[[sgs-ui-ngz]]): wire BlockFlow's preset installer to shell out to
`comfy-gen install-preset` instead of `comfy-gen download --batch`.

Brain pages filed: concept/runpod-cpu-pod-gotchas (global), projects/
comfy-gen.md updated (global), gotcha/installer-pod-modes (project).
Architecture overview pages still stale; tracked for a focused
/brain-sync follow-up.

Live-verified: install_done → /shutdown → orchestrator DELETE → GET /pods/<id> = 404 within 1s, still 404 after 30s, no [installer] starting restart line. Also covers health-timeout path (saw 3 orphans during dev — all now DELETEd by the same code). Belt: in-pod self-DELETE now logs success/HTTP-error/exception to stderr (was silently swallowed) and sets User-Agent: comfygen-installer/0.2. Merged: ComfyGen main @ ae3e0a6, remote-comfy-gen-handler main @ d84f87e. BlockFlow-side safety net tracked at sgs-ui-c7n.

Replaced comfy-gen download --batch (GPU serverless, ~$1.50/preset) with comfy-gen install-preset (CPU pod, ~$0.005/preset) in automation/smoke_preset.py. Three new helpers: resolve_volume_for_endpoint, run_install_preset (line-delimited JSON event stream consumer), and the integration into smoke(). 15/15 tests pass in test_smoke_preset.py (8 new); project-wide 108/108. Merged: ComfyGen main @ ae3e0a6. CircleCI smoke job needs no config changes — it already pip-installs ComfyGen main on every run.
